The following events took place in '''2,000,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] reaches an evolutionary crux where species must learn to adapt or die. It is during this violent period that [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] begin to evolve.<ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref>
*The [[Columi/Legends|Columi]] species establishes a technological society.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-04-03 -->[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]
*<!-- 2006-10-31 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''
